message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve european food and should be in the centre
The restaurant should be in the moderate price range
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 3 people at 16:30 on monday
If the booking fails how about 15:30
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and doesn't need to have free parking
The hotel should be in the same price range as the restaurant and should be in the type of guesthouse
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 5 nights starting from the same day
If the booking fails how about 2 nights
Make sure you get the reference number
